notes: Default categories overhauled: the old 8-bucket list (Housing, Utilities, Health, Transport, Entertainment, Food, Subscriptions, Other) is replaced by a 100-category taxonomy across 12 fiscal groups (Housing & Utilities, Food & Dining, Transportation, Health & Wellness, Personal Care, Shopping & Lifestyle, Entertainment & Leisure, Travel, Education, Financial & Legal, Family & Pets, Business & Work). Your existing bills, expenses, budgets and scheduled overrides are automatically remapped to the closest new category — nothing needs re-tagging.
The category picker now groups categories under their fiscal group with a search box up top, so finding one in the larger list stays quick.

New Settings > Custom Categories toggle: "Category icon colour" — Gold renders every default and custom category icon in one gold tone; By group keeps each fiscal group's own colour (used in charts and budget bars). Five new icons (Flame, Truck, Shirt, Shoe, Legal scale) were added to the shared icon library to cover the new categories, and are also selectable for custom categories.
